title: Nautilus Shell Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Nautilus Shell, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1
body:
# Nautilus Shell Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Nautilus Shell, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1

![Nautilus Shell Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb472bcec600a524e18e7d6afc692f59ddf2b6c.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Nautilus Shell Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.20 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Nautilus Shell Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Nautilus Shell Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
